calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Joseph A. Sacramento, Esq, represented Plaintiff, Joseph Angelesco and Defendant, Alexis Tessaro appeared in pro per. The case settled per written stipulation of parties. Trial date is vacated.
